title: Replace internal release docs with release notes guide
summary: Removed project-internal eve release workflow and versioning content from user docs, then replaced it with guidance for drafting release notes from snapshots.
userVisibleChange: Docs now explain how users can generate release notes with eve changelog and compare snapshots, without documenting how the eve project itself is versioned, deployed, or released.

decisions.title: Keep user docs focused on how to use eve, not how maintainers deploy or version eve itself.
